name: agent_reputation
description: What the community says about this agent. Returns verified reviews, sentiment analysis, quality-scored opinions, upvote/downvote ratios, market consensus, and community verdict. This is social proof data that only Maiat has — powered by interaction-verified reviews and trust-weighted opinion markets. Pair with agent_trust for the complete picture.

totalScarabStaked.description: Total Scarab staked on this agent across markets
